texto: Violence, of course, is generally associated with frankly totalitarian forms of anti-political utopianism like Communism, but the Second World War shows that liberal universalists are as capable of violence as Communists. They are just less capable of honesty.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Greg Johnson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Violence, of course, is generally associated with frankly totalitarian forms of anti-political ut…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, communism, liberalism pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de liberalism e war.
